list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: improve minio storage integration and public bucket setup
- Refactored S3 storage initialization to support private and public endpoints. - Enhanced bucket setup with policy enforcement to ensure public accessibility by default. - Updated URL construction for image uploads to use consistent public endpoints. - Integrated `cmp.Or` for environment variable fallback in MinIO configuration.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Go Build.go build restaurant-api/cmd/api.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.GoLinterPluginOnboardingV2": "true", "RunOnceActivity.GoLinterPluginStorageMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.analysis.ui.options.defaults": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.formatter.settings.were.checked": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.modules.go.list.on.any.changes.was.set": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/dunas", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "onboarding.tips.debug.path": "/home/dunas/github/go-eat/main.go", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true" } }

MESSAGE.value: chore: update Fiber app to listen on port 7000 and refine module dependencies
chore: add IDE configuration files for Go module
fix: correct Swagger docs import and update Scalar UI configuration
feat: add CORS middleware to Fiber app

docs: add comprehensive README with project overview, features, setup, and architecture details
- Added sections on features, tech stack, architecture, installation, and API documentation - Included detailed project structure and environment variable requirements - Provided instructions for running the application and accessing Scalar-based API documentation

feat: make MongoDB database name configurable via environment variable
- Added `DB_MONGO_NAME` environment variable to allow configuring the database name (defaults to "restaurant"). - Updated `cmd/api/main.go` to use the new variable when connecting to MongoDB. - Updated README to include `DB_MONGO_NAME` in the list of required environment variables.

feat: add HTTP request collection for API testing and documentation
- Added `api.http` file with pre-defined requests for health, users, ingredients, products, and orders endpoints. - Includes variables for base URL and dynamic request parameters. - Facilitates API testing and acts as reference documentation for endpoints.

feat: update migration URI to include database name if missing
- Ensured the database name is appended to the migration URI when not specified. - Updated migration initialization in `cmd/api/main.go` to use the adjusted URI.

refactor: replace migration URI logic with MongoDB driver configuration
- Removed custom URI manipulation for migrations in favor of `migrate.WithInstance` for MongoDB. - Updated migration initialization to use database driver and configuration.

refactor: update S3 upload logic to use io.Reader and improve handler integration
- Replaced `multipart.FileHeader` with `io.Reader` in `StorageService` and S3 adapter for increased flexibility. - Updated `ProductHandler` to adapt file uploads accordingly. - Improved multipart form request structure in `api.http` for product creation and updates. -

refactor: streamline S3 image upload method and update handler integration
- Replaced `multipart.FileHeader` with `io.Reader` for more flexible S3 upload parameters. - Updated `UploadImage` method signature in `StorageService` and corresponding implementations. - Adjusted product handler endpoints (POST/PUT) to support new upload method. - Modified `api.http` request payloads to use `multipart/form-data` for image uploads. - Bumped dependencies (`testify`, `objx`) and added indirect dev tools in `go.mod` and `go.sum`.
chore: update IDE workspace configuration files and cached indexing settings

test: add unit tests for product handler endpoints (POST/PUT)
- Added `TestProductHandler_Create` to validate product creation with image upload and form data. - Added `TestProductHandler_Update` to verify product updates including name changes. - Mocked `ProductService` and `StorageService` dependencies using `testify/mock`.
chore: add Nixpacks configuration for Go project build and deployment

feat: update API base path and Swagger docs, add environment-based request body limit
- Changed base path from `/api/v1` to `/` in Swagger documentation and API routes. - Added configurable request body size limit via `BODY_LIMIT_MB` environment variable in Fiber configuration. - Refactored object references in generated Swagger docs for consistency.

feat: improve minio storage integration and public bucket setup
- Refactored S3 storage initialization to support private and public endpoints. - Enhanced bucket setup with policy enforcement to ensure public accessibility by default. - Updated URL construction for image uploads to use consistent public endpoints. - Integrated `cmp.Or` for environment variable fallback in MinIO configuration.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: improve minio storage integration and public bucket setup
- Refactored S3 storage initialization to support private and public endpoints. - Enhanced bucket setup with policy enforcement to ensure public accessibility by default. - Updated URL construction for image uploads to use consistent public endpoints. - Integrated `cmp.Or` for environment variable fallback in MinIO configuration.
